title: Nursery Rhyme. CCXIII. Riddles.
content:
[Teeth and Gums.]

        Thirty white horses upon a red hill,
        Now they tramp, now they champ, now they stand still.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Unknown, titled "Nursery Rhyme. CCXIII. Riddles.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
